'''ngasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zestfully|zestfully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zestfully|zestfully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngasate|ngasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngasatesher|ngasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngasatesherĂ«m|ngasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngasatero|ngasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngasateshĂ«|ngasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngasateshĂ«m|ngasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingasatero|gokingasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingasateshĂ«|gokingasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingasateshĂ«m|gokingasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongasankerom|gongasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongasankeshĂ«|gongasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongasankeshĂ«m|gongasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongasankeya|gongasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngasaterom|ngasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngasatemu|ngasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngasateya|ngasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingasaterom|gokingasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingasatemu|gokingasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingasateya|gokingasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngasasate|ngasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngasasatesher|ngasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngasasatesherĂ«m|ngasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngasasatero|ngasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngasasateshĂ«|ngasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngasasateshĂ«m|ngasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingasasatero|gokingasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingasasateshĂ«|gokingasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingasasateshĂ«m|gokingasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongasasankerom|gongasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongasasankeshĂ«|gongasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongasasankeshĂ«m|gongasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongasasankeya|gongasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngasasaterom|ngasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngasasatemu|ngasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngasasateya|ngasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingasasaterom|gokingasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingasasatemu|gokingasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingasasateya|gokingasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠte|ngĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠtesher|ngĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠtero|ngĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠsĂŠtero|gokingĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠterom|ngĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠtemu|ngĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠsĂŠteya|ngĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠsĂŠterom|gokingĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠsĂŠteya|gokingĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafsafte|ngafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafsaftesher|ngafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafsaftesherĂ«m|ngafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafsaftero|ngafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafsafteshĂ«|ngafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafsafteshĂ«m|ngafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafsaftero|gokingafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafsafteshĂ«|gokingafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafsafteshĂ«m|gokingafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafsafnkerom|gongafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafsafnkeshĂ«|gongafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafsafnkeshĂ«m|gongafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafsafnkeya|gongafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafsafterom|ngafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafsaftemu|ngafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafsafteya|ngafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafsafterom|gokingafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafsaftemu|gokingafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafsafteya|gokingafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
